summary: Iteration 41 - Media Pub (Pub Média) Feature Testing Complete. 17/17 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI fully functional with Canva-style editor, TITELLI watermark, real-time preview, and category filtering.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Templates API: 34 templates across 7 categories (Réseaux Sociaux, Bannières Web, Restauration, Flyers & Affiches, Email Marketing, Vidéo, Print)
✅ Category filtering: Working correctly - filters templates by category
✅ Sur Mesure section: Displays when clicking 'Sur Mesure' button with custom form (79.90 CHF)
✅ Template editor: Canva-style with live preview, draggable elements, zoom controls
✅ TITELLI watermark: Visible on preview with multiple instances and central large watermark
✅ Real-time preview: Slogan and product name update instantly on canvas
✅ Color picker: Working - allows changing brand colors
✅ Payment button: Visible and enabled when form is filled
✅ Order creation API: POST /api/media-pub/orders creates order with 'processing' status
✅ Order retrieval API: GET /api/media-pub/orders/{id} returns order details with image_url when completed
✅ Image generation: Uses OpenAI DALL-E via Emergent LLM Key (NOT MOCKED - real AI generation)
✅ Admin routes: /api/media-pub/admin/orders returns stats (total, processing, completed, failed, revenue)
seed_data_creation: Test orders created with TEST_ prefix for cleanup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Media Pub feature fully functional. 34 templates available. Order fb314c13 is completed with generated image. Image generation uses real OpenAI DALL-E API via Emergent LLM Key. Payment flow simulated (Stripe integration ready but payment is simulated in current implementation).

features_verified: Sur Mesure section displays on click

image_generation: Real OpenAI DALL-E via Emergent LLM Key
payment_integration: Stripe ready but payment currently simulated in frontend
